description_long: This is a large, multi-story luxury house with a sprawling footprint and a prominent front driveway. The structure features a complex roofline with multiple intersecting hip and gable elements, and a mix of dormer and standard windows. The front facade is symmetrical, with a central entryway flanked by columns and decorative landscaping, and a three-car garage to one side. The rear of the house includes a covered patio area and a set of wide steps leading to the backyard. The property is enclosed by low fencing, and there is a small, separate garden or courtyard area visible to one side. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, giving the house a clean and upscale appearance.
description: A large, upscale two-story house with a complex roof, symmetrical front, three-car garage, and landscaped entryway. The property features a fenced yard and a separate garden area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, three-car garage, wide driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, garage extension, and the side fencing with a glimpse of the garden area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio, wide steps to the backyard, and multiple rear windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden/courtyard area, side windows, and the full length of the driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with double doors, flanked by columns, small porch, and decorative landscaping
